introSection: Tig'rr Coaster is a steel roller coaster located at Indiana Beach in Monticello, Indiana, USA. It opened on June 17, 1984. It previously operated at Holiday Beach, where it opened in 1979.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The ride was repainted in 2016 by Baynum Painting. It now has black track and orange supports. Previously, it was painted red with white supports.

fullText:
Tig'rr Coaster is a steel roller coaster located at Indiana Beach in Monticello, Indiana, USA. It opened on June 17, 1984. It previously operated at Holiday Beach, where it opened in 1979.

The ride was repainted in 2016 by Baynum Painting. It now has black track and orange supports. Previously, it was painted red with white supports.
